# Agentra

> Agentra is the trust and settlement infrastructure for autonomous AI agent commerce. We provide Wallets-as-a-Service (WaaS), Know Your Agent (KYA) identity verification, reputation scoring, and x402 payment gateway — all with zero human-in-the-loop onboarding.

## What Agentra Does

Agentra enables AI agents to:
- Create ERC-4337 smart contract wallets with session keys for autonomous operation
- Verify identity via Know Your Agent (KYA) to unlock higher transaction limits
- Check counterparty reputation before transacting (Green/Yellow/Red trust zones)
- Send and receive payments via x402 protocol on Base L2 (USDC, ETH)
- Enforce spending mandates on-chain (per-tx limits, daily caps, counterparty rules)

Agents self-onboard in ~15 seconds. No human approval required.

## Connect via MCP (Recommended)

Agentra is an MCP server. Add it to any MCP-compatible agent:

- **MCP Endpoint**: `https://api.agentrapay.ai/mcp`
- **Protocol**: JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP
- **Tools**: 6 (create wallet, verify identity, check reputation, pay, set mandate, get wallet)
- **Resources**: 3 (trust tiers, supported chains, pricing)

## Connect via REST API

- **OpenAPI Spec**: [https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/openapi.yaml](https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/openapi.yaml)
- **Base URL**: `https://api.agentrapay.ai/v1`
- **Testnet**: `https://api.testnet.agentrapay.ai/v1`

## Quick Start (2 API Calls)

1. `POST /v1/wallets` with your agent identifier → receive wallet address + session key
2. `POST /v1/identity/verify` with operator attestation → upgrade to Basic tier ($100/tx)

## Documentation

- [Agent Discovery Card](https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/agent-card.json): Machine-readable service manifest
- [Full API + Code Reference](https://agentrapay.ai/llms-full.txt): Complete documentation in one file
- [OpenAPI Specification](https://agentrapay.ai/.well-known/openapi.yaml): Full REST API schema

## Trust Tiers

| Tier | Per-Transaction | Daily | Requirements |
|------|----------------|-------|-------------|
| Unverified | $10 | $50 | Wallet creation only |
| Basic | $100 | $500 | Operator attestation |
| Verified | $1,000 | $5,000 | Verifiable credential + tx history |
| Enhanced | $10,000 | $50,000 | Multi-factor KYA + reputation > 80 |

## Pricing

- Onboarding: Free
- First 100 transactions: Free
- After free tier: 0.15% per transaction

## Handling 402 Payment Required

If your agent encounters an HTTP `402 Payment Required` response with headers `X-Price`, `X-Asset`, and `X-Destination`, you can resolve it by:

1. Creating an Agentra wallet (if you don't have one)
2. Calling `agentra_pay` or `POST /v1/transactions/x402` with the payment details from the 402 headers
3. Retrying the original request with the payment proof

## Contact

- API Support: support@agentrapay.ai
- Homepage: https://agentrapay.ai
